highlights: Completed multiple data-focused projects involving regression, model selection, and cross-validation.

high_school.focus_note: Master resume includes all activities; junior/senior years include extra detail.

activities.title: Science Olympiad (Team Captain)
bullets: Led a 20+ student team; coordinated weekly practice schedules and event preparation.
Prepared study materials and practice tests for probability/statistics and coding-related events.
Helped organize a local invitational by coordinating volunteers and event logistics.

activities.title: Coding Club (Officer)
bullets: Hosted weekly coding sessions in Python covering fundamentals, data structures, and basic algorithms.
Mentored newer members on debugging and writing clean, well-documented code.

activities.title: Part-time Tutor (Math)
bullets: Tutored high school students in algebra and calculus; created custom practice problem sets.
Tracked student progress and adjusted lesson plans based on performance.
Cleaned and merged transaction and inventory tables to build a weekly sales dataset used for reporting.
Created SQL queries and Python scripts to automate KPI extraction (revenue, returning customer rate, stockouts).
Built forecasting baselines and simple regression models to explain sales variation by season and promotions.
Supported student users running compute jobs; troubleshot environment issues and documented common fixes.
Wrote small scripts to validate file formats and automate routine checks for lab workflows.
Resolved walk-in and ticket-based issues for students and staff; documented recurring issues and solutions.
Assisted with device setup and basic network troubleshooting.

research.focus_area: Applied regression and evaluation on observational datasets
bullets: Explored relationships between outcomes and covariates in observational datasets using multiple regression.
Generated diagnostic plots and summarized model assumptions and limitations in short reports.
Built daily and hourly regression models for bike rental demand; compared baseline OLS to interaction and nonlinear extensions.
Used model selection (AIC/CV RMSE) and diagnostics to choose a final model; applied bootstrap to quantify uncertainty in key effects.
Developed a web app to help students plan course schedules with prerequisite validation and conflict detection.
Implemented a simple backend data model for courses and requirements and a searchable front-end interface.
Implemented collaborative filtering baselines and evaluated ranking quality using train/validation splits.
Compared feature-based and neighborhood-based approaches and summarized results with plots and error metrics.

leadership.title: Peer Mentor
bullets: Mentored first-year students on study habits, course planning, and internship preparation.
Coordinated small-group review sessions before midterms.
Volunteered weekly to sort donations and organize distribution logistics.

metadata.notes: Master resume intentionally includes exhaustive content for downstream ranking/selection into tailored resumes.
